name: testAddAcquirerFormOpensWithCorrectHeaderAndFieldsAndClosesCorrectly
description: Verify 'Add Acquirer' form opens with the correct header and input fields, and closes correctly.
descriptionHtml: Verify 'Add Acquirer' form opens with the correct header and input fields, and closes correctly.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify 'Add Acquirer' form opens with the correct header and input fields, and closes correctly.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: the header contains the expected title text
Verify: all placeholders are correct for each field
Verify: the Status Switch visible and contains switch Active&Inactive
Click on the 'Close' button to close form
Verify: the 'Add acquirer' dialog is no longer visible
